title: Facility Detail
description: Detail view for a single facility within a tenant. Displays institution identity, division, child locations (clinics, wards), and VistA grounding status. VistA File 4 (INSTITUTION) and File 44 (HOSPITAL LOCATION) are the source of truth. Read-only mirror with platform governance overlay.

dataSources.description: VistA institution record from File 4 — name, type, parent, status.
VistA hospital location records from File 44 — child clinics, wards, rooms. RPCs: ORWU CLINLOC, ORWU HOSPLOC.
